column76: Customer connected via live chat and inquired about the maximum validity period that could be obtained through a recharge. CM advised the customer to recharge BDT 995 and informed him that the SIM validity would be extended for up to 5 years. In response, CM stated that the recharged amount would remain in the main balance for 5 years. This information was incorrect. column76: The customer wanted to know how to back up his deleted SMS. The CM informed him that he could view those SMS from the MyGP app. Furthermore, when the customer asked how he could check 12 months of history, the CM stated that it was possible to view 12 months of history via the MyGP app. However, this was incorrect information. Through the MyGP app, a customer can only see the logs of which numbers sent or received the SMS, but they cannot view the actual text details or content of the SMS. Additionally, the MyGP app only displays usage history for up to 3 months, not 12 months.
